Function Documentation

int main (int argc, char * argv[])

Definition at line 25 of file strings/main.c.

25                                  {
26   long long count = 1;
27   static struct option long_options[] = {
28     {"count", required_argument, 0, 'n'},
29     {"help", no_argument, 0, 'h'},
30     {0, 0, 0, 0}
31   };
32 
33   int opt;
34   while ((opt = getopt_long(argc, argv, "n:h", long_options, NULL)) != -1) {
35     switch (opt) {
36       case 'n':
37         count = strtoll(optarg, NULL, 10);
38         break;
39       case 'h':
40         printf("Usage: ascii-chat-strings [-n|--count COUNT]\n");
41         printf("Generate memorable session strings (adjective-noun-noun format)\n");
42         printf("\nOptions:\n");
43         printf("  -n, --count COUNT   Generate COUNT session strings (default: 1)\n");
44         printf("  -h, --help          Show this help message\n");
45         return 0;
46       default:
47         return ERROR_USAGE;
48     }
49   }
50 
51   if (count <= 0 || (long long)count > ACDS_MAX_UNIQUE_SESSIONS) {
52     return ERROR_USAGE;
53   }
54 
55   // Generate session strings
56   for (long long i = 0; i < count; i++) {
57     uint32_t adj_idx = randombytes_uniform((uint32_t)adjectives_count);
58     uint32_t noun1_idx = randombytes_uniform((uint32_t)nouns_count);
59     uint32_t noun2_idx = randombytes_uniform((uint32_t)nouns_count);
60 
61     printf("%s-%s-%s\n",
62            adjectives[adj_idx],
63            nouns[noun1_idx],
64            nouns[noun2_idx]);
65   }
66 
67   return 0;
68 }




References ACDS_MAX_UNIQUE_SESSIONS, adjectives,
    adjectives_count, nouns, and nouns_count.
